design_philosophy: Rustic, warm, editorial, handcrafted feel. Avoid AI-slop standard patterns. Focus on wood tones, natural materials, and asymmetric layouts to emphasize craftsmanship and storytelling.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#2C2A28] font-serif
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight text-[#2C2A28] font-serif
typography.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[#8C4A32] font-sans

layout.spacing_system: Generous (p-8 to p-24) to create an editorial gallery feel.
layout.grids: Asymmetric bento or masonry grids (md:grid-cols-12) for portfolio and shop sections. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly.
layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm. Keep edges sharp and tactile.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-none), bg-[#8C4A32] hover:bg-[#703B28] text-[#F9F6F0] px-8 py-3 transition-colors duration-300.
components.cards: No visible boundaries unless necessary (border-[#E3DACD]). Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/editorial sections, Shadcn for Shop/Forms. Minimal shadows (shadow-sm or none).
components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism but tinted warm (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 border-b border-[#E3DACD]). Logo must be serif, links clearly visible.
components.footer: Dark warm contrast (bg-[#2C2A28] text-[#F9F6F0]) with massive 'Let's Talk' CTA and generous vertical padding (py-24).
components.inputs: Shadcn based, but customized. Sharp edges, border-[#E3DACD], focus:ring-[#8C4A32] bg-[#F9F6F0].

sections.hero: Immersive wide image layout, max-h-[85vh]. If text overlaps image, use bg-gradient-to-r from-[#2C2A28]/60 to-transparent for contrast. Asymmetric alignment.
sections.portfolio: Tetris Grid (col-span-full, col-span-4, col-span-8). Focus on close-ups of wood grain. Hover reveals project name.
sections.shop: Minimalist editorial product cards. Image takes priority. Clean serif title, muted price. 'Buy Now' appears on hover or subtle below.
sections.product_detail: Split screen: Sticky large image on the left, scrolling details, story, and checkout (Stripe) on the right.
sections.contact: Editorial split. Left side: Atmospheric workshop image. Right side: Clean, sharp-edged form.

motion.hover: Subtle scale-up (scale-105) for images, opacity fades for text. Slow transitions (duration-500 ease-out).
motion.scroll: Use Lenis for momentum scrolling (simulates heavy, premium feel).

hero.description: Carpenter focuses on woodworking project inside a busy workshop

craftsman.description: A person cutting a piece of wood, close up of hands

workshop_texture.description: Vintage hand tools in a rustic workshop

product_board.description: Wooden cutting board on wooden table

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind for layout to achieve the asymmetrical, editorial design. Do not rely heavily on generic Shadcn Card wrappers for marketing sections.
Install and configure Playfair Display (headings) and Work Sans (body). Do NOT use Inter or Roboto.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, product cards, form inputs) include proper data-testid attributes.
Use standard browser scrolling if Lenis is unavailable, but prioritize smooth, deliberate interactions.
Implement the 'Shop' and 'Product Detail' pages with a high-end editorial feel—large images, plenty of negative space, and clear typography.
Ensure the hero image has a sufficient gradient overlay to maintain text contrast (APCA compliant).
